codeReview.summary: Implementation matches feature requirements: _salutation_name now handles LAST,FIRST records, strips Jr/Sr/III-style suffixes, preserves FIRST LAST behavior, returns Property Owner for corporate/blank placeholders, and includes targeted unit tests for each required format.
